**Aperture does not accept pull requests.** Please [open an issue](https://github.com/felixtrz/aperture/issues/new/choose) instead — issues are very welcome. See [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](https://github.com/felixtrz/aperture/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md).
